description_long: This sculpture features a life-sized figure of a man in formal attire, standing upright on a tall rectangular pedestal. The pedestal is integrated into a multi-level stone base, which includes two additional rectangular blocks of varying heights and sizes, one of which bears visible inscriptions or plaques. The entire structure is set on a square-tiled platform, suggesting a permanent installation. The figure's posture is dignified, with hands resting in front, and the overall composition is symmetrical and monumental. The materials appear to be stone or concrete, with a consistent gray coloration and matte finish. The presence of inscriptions and the formal pose indicate this is likely a commemorative or historical monument.
description: A gray stone or concrete statue of a formally dressed man stands on a multi-level pedestal with inscribed plaques, all set on a tiled platform. The monument is dignified and commemorative in appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full figure of the man, the main pedestal, and two inscribed blocks on the tiled base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the pedestal and the figure's profile, with the layered blocks visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the figure and the plain surfaces of the pedestal and blocks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the tall block and the back of the statue, emphasizing the monument's layered structure.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed on a tiled platform, suggesting an outdoor urban or park setting.
